Identity.Name: StingSuitabilityCodes
Identity.Definition: ISO 19650-2 information-container suitability codes — the standard letter-and-number codes that classify whether a document / model is suitable for coordination (S1), information (S2), review and comment (S3), stage approval (S4), construction (S5), as-built (S6), PIM-to-AIM handover (S7) — and the published-state codes A1..A5 for authorised use. Applied to drawings, sheets, transmittals, deliverables.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-2:2018 Annex B / UK Annex; BS EN ISO 19650-1:2018 Table 5

Value.Definition: Initial status — issued for sharing within originator's team. Pre-coordination WIP.
Suitable for Coordination — shared across disciplines for design coordination.
Suitable for Information — shared with the wider team for information only.
Suitable for Review and Comment — issued for formal review by the lead appointed party.
Suitable for Stage Approval — formal client / appointing-party approval gate.
Suitable for PIM Authorisation — Project Information Model authorised by appointing party.
Suitable for AIM Authorisation — Asset Information Model authorised. Bridge from PIM to AIM at handover.
Suitable for AIM Update — change to in-use Asset Information Model.
Authorised — for installation / construction on site.
Archived — superseded but retained for audit. Read-only.
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails at any published state.
